# Quadratic equation solving method

## Short Teaching Summary
Quadratic equation solving method: When solving a quadratic equation, try factorisation first; if that is not possible, use the quadratic formula or completing the square. Map connection: this idea links by common_mistake_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
